title: ColorfulCollars
description: Freely blend colors of your pet's collar
body:
### Description 
This is a simple mod that allows your pet's(cats and dogs) collar to be freely dyed and have colors mixed without being limited by the dye types in Minecraft.
### What this mod does
1.Now, when you use dye on your pets, _**the collar color will be a blend of the original color and the dye color**_ , **instead of Mojang's low-quality system that simply overrides the color.**

2.Based on the 24w35a update: **The collar color now defaults to a valid mixed color of the parents' collar colors, unless the mix does not exist or the parents' collar colors cannot be combined.** However, this blending is not ideal. This mod ensures that _**the collar color is truly a blend of the parents' collar colors**_, unaffected by conditions like "the mix does not exist" or "the parents' collar colors cannot be combined.
